missing_surfaces.note: No repository-owned Contact HTML route or Vite input exists.
Support refers to a refund policy but no dedicated route exists.
No repository-owned commercial disclosure route exists.

cross_route_gaps.detail: U10F derives General Public Readiness from the repository-owned route inventory and requires both Twitch and Kick Watchlist routes within the 20-route build audit.
U10F assigns all 20 repository-owned HTML routes to Production Smoke, including About, Support, Changelog, both Channel routes, and both Watchlist routes.
P8B established a permanent browser audit across major public routes and four required widths; later Phase 10 gates retain feature-specific evidence.
Phase 9 P9H0-P9H7 repaired and accepted the approved History P1 defects.
Repository-owned Contact, Terms, Privacy, Refund Policy, and Commercial Disclosure routes are absent.
cross_route_gaps.next_phase: Phase 12 unless audit evidence promotes earlier
